textByHash.053204f500c9a08d683d2f92dc621fef1480f58a: Don't you know what kind of fish I like? Talk to my other servants for some advice.
textByHash.05ec2a6560026cdd6dc773b0e78dd7f5fc5517f5: You are a skilled worker. A human like you is worth a great deal as a slave.
textByHash.088a26bef6b0f7ca4bd484349a883c88139a0446: Most humans do, that's why I'm wearing this amulet of Man speak... but I do try to train my staff in civilised speech.
textByHash.1041247f7ea608d53819e6d2ca71c9beaabe019e: What, are you giving me cooked fish? What am I going to do with that? Uncook it first!
textByHash.1c68c6d216a4388e0aaf03693a96a2b059bc720c: Because I say so! And because I can never have enough servants!
textByHash.2005c68a4dafc0ae73c4e2de475251e607e4e6c7: Oh, you mean the Bob in your world? Nothing. I am an incarnation of Bob here on ScapeRune.
textByHash.5ba5275794aa9d2cb40e5f0a41f8be8e0d761e8b: Let me assure you there's no way out.
textByHash.61fbe936aa2a8a825fc8efd29951f25976364de7: I will never let you go!
textByHash.6f83a117f20421cac185090e9466ad9de3bf2d33: Hey, , come with me if you like fishing! Or has this amulet of humanspeak broken again?
textByHash.74fd2dfd91bec3effa3320671a302bbc23ce100d: You heard me! There's the cold fire, by the trees, now get uncooking!
textByHash.7a0e3a8c84054d1c47a6570095a6c16e5c751d78: Now get me another one, you no good human!
textByHash.7b1ea5c41e4986bb3d4a7888c830ac321da31d58: Now be reasonable little human. It's just a matter of time before you will do everything I ask you to. Play along and this can be a very nice place.
textByHash.87327aa7e03dc21927962db9e847343db1e771fc: Now catch me some fish, I'm hungry.
textByHash.95894417a3d7df169061b55786900cb26359406a: Ah, but I suppose things are slightly different in your world... what a dreadful place that must be.
textByHash.a3ca62197e4ede6d0ffe795ac69d777e254e0ace: Now, let me take... a little... catnap...
textByHash.a5d0aa79e612bd1b728d08f6db244aff67762ce0: What was this? That was absolutely disgusting!
textByHash.c01a3790bfa25bec4553bb0be79763d5da77d4f7: How is it possible that you're not meowing?
textByHash.c27d28102a08128a4eb23fba9ced2b3c168950f8: What am I to do with that? Catch me some fish, puny human!
textByHash.c72d00146230124d5ea25db420a4fd9b977d08d5: I am your leader, you are but a slave!
textByHash.c81123d32d04f2efd6ddeba266366a0a0b4201f2: Something like that... somewhere in ScapeRune there must be a human servant called .
textByHash.cb1b6658b9d0ff8838a0de8792453ce282bbb8c3: Sit down and I'll tell you. It's a question of servant shortage.
textByHash.e22870fa73c7e82e6c489659a826543805d9e284: But you work just as well for me! Now get to work, human! Fish for me!
textByHash.f75c2f89d6feb9b2ae8d0080ef14301e52cc542b: Do you wanna meet my pet? His name's Pete. Or has this amulet of humanspeak broken again?
textByHash.f75fed396e4f05c9172b8cd4d33027a6a9c3f70e: Talk to my other servants, and hurry it up!
